questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'this' keyword in Java classes?
questions.hint: Use this keyword to access variables from the current object

questions.question: Write a constructor in Java that initializes the 'name' and 'age' variables of a class.
questions.hint: Use the 'this' keyword to call the superclass constructor

questions.question: What is the effect of not calling the superclass constructor in a subclass's constructor?
questions.hint: Inherits all fields and methods, but without the superclass's initialization
